case_title: GARY PETERS ET AL VS. MARGO BROWN

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, MARGO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PETERS, GARY PETERS, FRIDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, MARGO $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,075.00, DEFENDANT'S TEXTS ACKNOWLEDGE CARELESSNESS IN NOT CHECKING THE GARAGE DOOR, AND I FIND SHE WAS NEGLIGENT. BUT MOST OF THE HARM HERE WAS CAUSED BY PLAINTIFFS' NEGLIGENCE IN LEAVING SUCH A VALUABLE ITEM UNSECURED. ALSO, PLAINTIFF FRIDA PETERS ADMITTED THAT SHE DID NOT HEAR THE GARAGE DOOR CLOSE, BUT DID NOT CHECK. KNOWING THE VALUE OF THE ITEM SHE LEFT IN THE GARAGE, SHE SHOULD HAVE CHECKED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PETERS, GARY PETERS, FRIDA AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, MARGO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-04-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFFS GARY PETERS AND FRIDA PETERS ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARGO BROWN IS PRESENT. NO FILED PROOF OF SEVICE FILED WITH THE COURT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE FILING. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.
